overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man showing the character walking through a wet urban city street at night. The scene transitions from a cobblestone plaza area with benches and planters to a concrete sidewalk approaching a crosswalk, illuminated by street lamps and neon signage.

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking steadily through the cobblestone plaza toward the street intersection ahead

entered.detail: row of green wooden benches lining the left side of the cobblestone path
large rectangular stone planter containing shrubs and small trees
classic black street lamp post with warm yellow illumination
commercial building with illuminated 'CLUB SHINE' signage above the entrance

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a wet cobblestone pedestrian plaza lined with green benches and raised stone planters. An ornate street lamp casts warm light on the reflective pavement as the character approaches the street intersection, with the Club Shine building visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete sidewalk at street intersection with crosswalk

events.description: ground surface transitions from cobblestone plaza to concrete sidewalk at the street corner
white sedan drives past on the street from left to right

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the concrete sidewalk toward the pedestrian crosswalk

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving along the street from left to right

entered.detail: tall metal pole with yellow traffic signal box and pedestrian crossing lights
white striped crosswalk markings across the asphalt street ahead
asphalt street with vehicle traffic and reflective wet surface

segments.scene_description: Moving onto the concrete sidewalk, Spider-Man approaches a crosswalk at the urban intersection. A white sedan passes by on the wet asphalt street while the traffic signal pole comes into view on the left. The Club Shine building shifts to the right side of the frame as the camera continues forward toward the crossing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, ornate pedestrian plaza toward a bustling urban street intersection at night. It begins with Spider-Man walking along wet cobblestones lined with green benches and stone planters, where a warm street lamp reflects off the damp pavement. As the character advances toward the street, the scene shifts from the plaza to a concrete sidewalk, bringing a traffic signal pole into view on the left. The camera continues forward as a white sedan passes by on the wet asphalt, while the Club Shine building gradually shifts to the right side of the frame. The movement finally culminates as the character approaches the crosswalk, fully transitioning from the secluded plaza into the neon-lit city traffic.
